name: github-app-token-orb
description: CircleCI orb source for generating GitHub App installation access tokens.

scripts.lint: node --check src/scripts/create_token.mjs && node --check scripts/pack_orb.mjs && node --check scripts/build_command_wrappers.mjs && bash -n src/scripts/configure_git.sh && bash -n src/scripts/install_runtime_deps.sh && bash -n src/scripts/create_command.sh
